title: Payment terms badge
description: Badge showing payment_terms + due date + relative status. Renders traffic-light colors: green for 'due in future', yellow for 'due today' + 'due in 3 days', red for 'overdue'. Used in the invoice list DataGrid + the invoice view header + the customer 'my invoices' surface.

invoice.description: Full invoice object with payment_terms + due_date + status + payment_terms_custom_days.

relativeLabel.expr: invoice.status IN ['paid', 'void', 'refunded', 'written_off'] ? '' : (daysUntilDue < 0 ? ('Overdue by ' + Math.abs(daysUntilDue) + 'd') : (daysUntilDue == 0 ? 'Due today' : (daysUntilDue == 1 ? 'Due tomorrow' : 'Due in ' + daysUntilDue + 'd')))
